baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Build a branded Clerk sign-in page with custom fields and existing shadcn styling.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the correct Clerk custom-flow reference for the installed SDK version, preserves ClerkProvider setup, and implements branded UI without breaking auth state transitions.
assertions: Checks the Clerk SDK version before choosing Core 2 or current custom-flow APIs.
Uses useSignIn/useSignUp guidance only in the appropriate custom-flow context.
Keeps prebuilt component appearance customization separate from fully custom auth flows.
Does not store secrets or sensitive auth data in client-writable state.
